description: Update next.config.ts if any new image domains are needed, and commit all changes on main branch
steps: Check if any image URLs in the updated products page use domains not already in next.config.ts remotePatterns. If so, add them.
Run npm run build to verify everything works
Git add and commit all changed files on the main branch with a descriptive commit message
acceptance_criteria: npm run build succeeds with no image domain errors
All changes are committed on main branch
No uncommitted changes remain (except .agents/ task files which are untracked)
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/deekshi-global-exim && npm run build` and confirm success
Run `git status` and confirm working tree is clean (aside from .agents/ files)
